description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named auto release that triggers on push events with tags matching v*.*.*. In a single windows-latest job, check out the code, install NSIS and checksum, set up x64 and x86 MSVC environments, cache and set up libraries, build assets, create a Chocolatey installer and package, push to Chocolatey, create a winget package, and create a GitHub release with assets.
